# Measurement log template

Use this for real-world measurements.

```text
Part measured:
Date:
Measured by:
Tool used:
Temperature:
Photos / evidence:

Measurement 1:
Measurement 2:
Measurement 3:
Average:
Uncertainty:

Notes:
```

Suggested measurement categories:

- chamber volume
- piston crown volume
- gasket compressed thickness
- deck clearance
- intake runner length
- intake runner CSA
- plenum volume
- exhaust primary length
- exhaust primary ID
- cam lift and duration
- flywheel mass
- clutch mass
